nasb.text: Therefore, you shall keep the commandment and the statutes and the judgments which I am commanding you today, to do them.

esv.text: You shall therefore be careful to do the commandment and the statutes and the rules that I command you today.

cnv.text: 所以你要謹守遵行我今日吩咐你的誡命、律例和典章。

ccb.text: 所以，你们要遵行我今天吩咐你们的诫命、律例和典章。
